title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the second G1 sprint race—the Sprinters
Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hill before the finish line at the Nakayama
Racecourse is steep—but that makes this the
perfect opportunity to showcase Taiki Shuttle's
talents!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki competes in high spirits, already imagining
the post-race party.
